RAG Document Q&A API — Sample Fixture

This is a short sample document used for unit and integration tests.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines document retrieval with language model synthesis.
The system chunks documents, embeds each chunk into a vector database, and retrieves relevant
passages at query time to ground the model's answer in source material.

When a user asks a question, the query is embedded and compared against stored chunk vectors.
The top matching chunks are passed to the LLM as context, and the response includes citations
pointing back to the original document excerpts.
